revision.comment: [[奈良市]]の[[平城宮]]跡北方、法華寺町に存在する[[前方後円墳]]
revision.text:
[[Image:Sakitatanamikofungun.jpg|250px|right|thumb|平城宮跡（左下）と佐紀盾列古墳群</br>古墳群の東端、国道24号線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''とは[[奈良市]]の[[平城宮]]跡北方、[[法華寺町]]に存在する[[前方後円墳]]。'''宇和奈邊古墳'''とも綴られる。付近に存在する大小60あまりの古墳集団である[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（ウワナベ古墳群）の東端に位置している。
明治時代には英国出身の登山家である[[ウィリアム・ゴーランド]]によって調査が行われた。英国への帰国後1897年に発表された論文「The Dolmens and Mounds in Japan」の対象となった古墳（名称は記されていない）は現在ウワナベ古墳であると比定されている。
==基礎データ== *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 205.4メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル
==参考文献== *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 昭和24年
[[Category:古墳|うわなべこふん]]

contributor.username: ja>King William, the Ruler of Wheels!

古墳群の東端、国道24号線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''とは[[奈良市]]の[[平城宮]]跡北方、[[法華寺町]]に存在する[[前方後円墳]]。'''宇和奈邊古墳'''とも綴られる。付近に存在する大小60あまりの古墳集団である[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（ウワナベ古墳群）の東端に位置している。 == 概要 == 明治時代には英国出身の大阪[[造幣局 (日本)|造幣局]]技師で登山家でもある[[ウィリアム・ゴーランド]]によって調査が行われた。英国への帰国後[[1897年]]に発表された論文「The Dolmens and Mounds in Japan」の対象となった古墳（名称は記されていない）は現在ウワナベ古墳であると比定されている。 ==基礎データ== *前方部幅　129.5メートル *後円部径　128メートル *全長　205.4メートル *前方部高　16メートル *後円部高　19.8メートル == 関連項目 == *[[日本の古墳一覧]] ==参考文献== *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報　奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群　大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県　昭和24年 [[Category:古墳|うわなべこふん]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路|うわなべこふん]]

古墳群の東端、国道24号線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''とは[[奈良市]]の[[平城宮]]跡北方、[[法華寺町]]に存在する[[前方後円墳]]。'''宇和奈邊古墳'''とも綴られる。付近に存在する大小60あまりの古墳集団である[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（ウワナベ古墳群）の東端に位置している。 ==基礎データ== *前方部幅　129.5メートル *後円部径　128メートル *全長　205.4メートル *前方部高　16メートル *後円部高　19.8メートル == 関連項目 == *[[日本の古墳一覧]] ==参考文献== *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報　奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群　大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県　昭和24年 [[Category:奈良県の古墳|うわなべこふん]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路|うわなべこふん]] [[Category:前方後円墳]]

古墳群の東端、国道24号線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''は、[[奈良市]][[法華寺町]]にある[[前方後円墳]]。表記は「'''宇和奈邊古墳'''（宇和奈辺古墳）」とも。 [[宮内庁]]により「'''宇和奈辺陵墓参考地'''」（被葬候補者：第16代[[仁徳天皇]]皇后[[八田皇女]]）として[[陵墓参考地]]に治定されている。付近に存在する大小60あまりの古墳集団である[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（ウワナベ古墳群）の東端に位置している。 ==基礎データ== *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 205.4メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル ==参考文献== *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』 奈良県 [[1949年]] ==関連項目== *[[日本の古墳一覧]] {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]]

古墳群の東端、国道24号線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（'''宇和奈邊古墳'''/宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]][[法華寺町]]にある[[前方後円墳]]。 [[宮内庁]]により「'''宇和奈辺陵墓参考地'''」（被葬候補者：第16代[[仁徳天皇]]皇后[[八田皇女]]）として[[陵墓参考地]]に治定されている。付近に存在する大小60あまりの古墳集団である[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（ウワナベ古墳群）の東端に位置している。 ==規模== *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 205.4メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} ==参考文献== *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』 奈良県 [[1949年]] {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]]

古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（宇和奈邊古墳/宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する古墳の1つ。 実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]により「'''宇和奈辺陵墓参考地'''」（被葬候補者：第16代[[仁徳天皇]]皇后[[八田皇女]]）として[[陵墓参考地]]に治定されている。佐紀盾列古墳群の東端に位置する。 ==規模== *前方部幅 129.5[[メートル]] *後円部径 128メートル *全長 205.4メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} ==参考文献== {{osm box|w|264859508}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』 奈良県 [[1949年]] {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

{{日本の古墳 |名称=ウワナベ古墳 |別名=宇和奈辺古墳 |所属=[[佐紀盾列古墳群]] |所在地=[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 41|緯度秒 = 51.45 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 48|経度秒 = 32.47 |ISO = JP-29 |形状=[[前方後円墳]] |規模=墳丘長270-280[[メートル|m]][https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c 「ウワナベ」全長280メートル 奈良 佐紀古墳群最大規模]『[[毎日新聞]]』朝刊2020年11月21日（2020年12月13日閲覧）
高さ19.8m |築造年代=[[5世紀]]中頃 |被葬者=（[[宮内庁]]推定）[[八田皇女]] |陵墓=[[宮内庁]]治定「宇和奈辺陵墓参考地」 |出土品=[[円筒埴輪]] |画像=[[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘全景（左に前方部、右奥に後円部） |特記事項=全長で日本第12位または全国第13位（墳丘長255mとする場合）[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html 古墳大きさランキング（日本全国版）][[堺市]]ホームページ（2019年11月14日更新版）2020年12月13日閲覧の規模 |地図 = Nara city |ラベル = ウワナベ
古墳 |アイコン = 前方後円墳-南 }} [[File:790911 Uwanabe kofun aerial.jpg|thumb|220px|ウワナベ古墳の空中写真（1979年）
{{国土航空写真}}]] [[Image:Sakitatanamikofungun.jpg|250px|right|thumb|[[平城宮]]跡（左下）と[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]
古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳
{{国土航空写真}}]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（宇和奈邊古墳/宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[前方後円墳]]。[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（佐紀古墳群[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山（さきみささぎやま）古墳［奈良市山稜町］]奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧）、ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する[[古墳]]の一つで、東端に位置する（西隣は[[コナベ古墳]]）。 実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]により「'''宇和奈辺陵墓参考地'''」（被葬候補者：第16代[[仁徳天皇]]皇后[[八田皇女]]）として[[陵墓参考地]]に治定されている（「[[宮内庁治定陵墓の一覧#陵墓参考地]]」参照）。 ==構造と規模== 現在は上部を[[植生]]が覆っているが、[[墳丘]]は三段で、斜面に[[葺石]]が敷かれ、一段目の周囲は[[埴輪]]が並べられていた。墳丘は宮内庁が、周囲を取り巻く周濠は地元の農家組合が管理している。[[測量]]図から全長255[[メートル]]と推測されてきたが、宮内庁や[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]、奈良市[[教育委員会]]による発掘調査結果が2020年11月20日発表され、後円部側周濠の北東と東の葺石の先で見つかった基底石を含めた全長は270-280メートルで、同じ佐紀古墳群の[[五社神古墳]]（全長267メートル）を上回り、[[日本]]国内で第12位になることが明らかとなった。 *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 270-280メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} ==参考文献== {{osm box|w|264859508}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

{{国土航空写真}}]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（宇和奈邊古墳/宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[前方後円墳]]。[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]（佐紀古墳群[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山（さきみささぎやま）古墳［奈良市山稜町］]奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧）、ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する[[古墳]]の一つで、東端に位置する（西隣は[[コナベ古墳]]）。 実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]により「'''宇和奈辺陵墓参考地'''」（被葬候補者：第16代[[仁徳天皇]]皇后[[八田皇女]]）として[[陵墓参考地]]に治定されている（「[[宮内庁治定陵墓の一覧#陵墓参考地]]」参照）。 この場所は[[淀川]]水系と[[大和川]]水系の[[分水界]]となっており、増水すると、北に溢れ出た水は淀川を目指し、南に溢れ出た水は大和川を目指す。 ==構造と規模== 現在は上部を[[植生]]が覆っているが、[[墳丘]]は三段で、斜面に[[葺石]]が敷かれ、一段目の周囲は[[埴輪]]が並べられていた。墳丘は宮内庁が、周囲を取り巻く周濠は地元の農家組合が管理している。[[測量]]図から全長255[[メートル]]と推測されてきたが、宮内庁や[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]、奈良市[[教育委員会]]による発掘調査結果が2020年11月20日発表され、後円部側周濠の北東と東の葺石の先で見つかった基底石を含めた全長は270-280メートルで、同じ佐紀古墳群の[[五社神古墳]]（全長267メートル）を上回り、[[日本]]国内で第12位になることが明らかとなった。 *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 270-280メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} ==参考文献== {{osm box|w|264859508}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

{{国土航空写真}}]] [[Image:Sakitatanamikofungun.jpg|280px|right|thumb|[[平城宮]]跡（左下）と[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]
古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳
{{国土航空写真}}]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（うわなべ こふん、宇和奈邊古墳、宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[前方後円墳]]で、'''[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]'''（ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する[[古墳]]の一つで、最東端に位置する巨大古墳。 5世紀中頃に作られたとされており、[[応神天皇]]の娘、[[仁徳天皇]]の皇后である[[八田皇女]]の[[陵墓参考地]]として[[宮内庁治定陵墓の一覧#陵墓参考地|治定]]されている。 ==構造と規模== [[墳丘]]は三段で、斜面に[[葺石]]が敷かれ、一段目の周囲は[[埴輪]]が並べられていた。墳丘は宮内庁が、周囲を取り巻く周濠は地元の農家組合が管理しており、現在は上部を[[植生]]が覆っている。 [[測量]]図から全長255[[メートル]]と推測されてきたが、宮内庁や[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]、奈良市[[教育委員会]]による発掘調査結果が2020年11月20日発表され、後円部側周濠の北東と東の葺石の先で見つかった基底石を含めた全長は270-280メートルで、同じ佐紀古墳群の[[五社神古墳]]（全長267メートル）を上回り、[[日本]]国内で第12位になることが明らかとなった。 *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 270-280メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル == 地勢 == この地域には、東西約[[尺貫法#長さ・距離（度）|12町]]のあいだに、東からウワナベ古墳、[[コナベ古墳]]、水上池、[[市庭古墳]]（[[平城天皇]]楊梅陵）が並び、北側には[[ヒシアゲ古墳]]（[[仁徳天皇]]の前皇后[[磐之媛]]命の[[平城京|平城]]坂上陵）{{efn|{{コトバンク|奈良坂|平城坂（奈良坂）は奈良市の北から京都府木津川市木津に出る坂道。}}}}、ヒシャゲ古墳外堤埴輪列（復元）などが並ぶ。 上記古墳のうち[[市庭古墳]]以外は周囲に堀がめぐらされており[[遊水地]]の状態でもある。[[淀川]]水系と[[大和川]]水系の[[分水界]]となっており、増水すると、北に溢れ出た水は淀川を目指し、南に溢れ出た水は大和川を目指す。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} ;注釈 {{notelist}} ;出典 {{reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[仁徳陵]] ==参考文献== {{osm box|w|264859508}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] *[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山古墳]（さき みささぎやま、奈良市山稜町）「前期末葉の巨大古墳の実態」- 奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧） == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳
{{国土航空写真}}]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（うわなべ こふん、宇和奈邊古墳、宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[前方後円墳]]。'''[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]'''（ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する[[古墳]]の一つで、古墳群の最東端に位置し、もっとも大きい巨大古墳。 5世紀中頃に作られたとされており、[[応神天皇]]の娘、[[仁徳天皇]]の皇后である[[八田皇女]]の[[陵墓参考地]]として[[宮内庁治定陵墓の一覧#陵墓参考地|治定]]されている。 ==構造と規模== [[墳丘]]は三段で、斜面に[[葺石]]が敷かれ、一段目の周囲は[[埴輪]]が並べられていた。墳丘は宮内庁が、周囲を取り巻く周濠は地元の農家組合が管理しており、現在は上部を[[植生]]が覆っている。 [[測量]]図から全長255[[メートル]]と推測されてきたが、宮内庁や[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]、奈良市[[教育委員会]]による発掘調査結果が2020年11月20日発表され、後円部側周濠の北東と東の葺石の先で見つかった基底石を含めた全長は270-280メートルで、同じ佐紀古墳群の[[五社神古墳]]（全長267メートル）を上回り、[[日本]]国内で第12位になることが明らかとなった。 *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 270-280メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル == 地勢 == 6世紀に[[奈良盆地]]で栄えた[[平城京]]（奈良市、[[大和郡山市]]、[[天理市]]他）の最北端に位置する[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]は、東西約[[尺貫法#長さ・距離（度）|12町]]のあいだに、東からウワナベ古墳、[[コナベ古墳]]、水上池、[[市庭古墳]]（[[平城天皇]]楊梅陵）が並び、北側には[[ヒシアゲ古墳]]（[[仁徳天皇]]の前皇后[[磐之媛]]命の[[平城京|平城]]坂上陵）{{efn|{{コトバンク|奈良坂|平城坂（奈良坂）は奈良市の北から京都府木津川市木津に出る坂道。}}}}、ヒシャゲ古墳外堤埴輪列（復元）などが並ぶ。 上記古墳のうち[[市庭古墳]]以外は周囲に堀がめぐらされており、[[遊水地]]の島といった様態である。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} ;注釈 {{notelist}} ;出典 {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] *[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山古墳]（さき みささぎやま、奈良市山稜町）「前期末葉の巨大古墳の実態」- 奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧） == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|year=2019|chapter=平成29年度 墳丘外表面調査の成果報告 -宇和奈辺陵墓参考地-|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo070b054.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第70号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 * {{Cite book|和書|year=2022|chapter=宇和奈辺陵墓参考地整備工事予定区域事前調査|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo073b048.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第73号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 ** 「附 宇和奈辺陵墓参考地にみられた石材の石種について」。 == 外部リンク == {{osm box|w|264859508}} * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

古墳 |アイコン = 前方後円墳-南 }} [[File:790911 Uwanabe kofun aerial.jpg|thumb|280px|ウワナベ古墳の空中写真（1979年）

{{日本の古墳 |名称=ウワナベ古墳 |別名=宇和奈辺古墳 |所属=[[佐紀盾列古墳群]] |所在地=[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 41|緯度秒 = 51.45 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 48|経度秒 = 32.47 |ISO = JP-29 |形状=[[前方後円墳]] |規模=墳丘長270-280[[メートル|m]][https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c 「ウワナベ」全長280メートル 奈良 佐紀古墳群最大規模]『[[毎日新聞]]』朝刊2020年11月21日（2020年12月13日閲覧）
高さ19.8m |築造年代=[[5世紀]]中頃 |被葬者=（[[宮内庁]]推定）[[八田皇女]] |陵墓=[[宮内庁]]治定「宇和奈辺陵墓参考地」 |出土品=[[円筒埴輪]] |画像=[[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
墳丘全景（左に前方部、右奥に後円部） |特記事項=全国第12位または第13位（墳丘長255mとする場合）[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html 古墳大きさランキング（日本全国版）][[堺市]]ホームページ（2019年11月14日更新版）2020年12月13日閲覧の規模 |地図2= {{Location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=ウワナベ古墳|mark=前方後円墳-南.png|marksize=23|caption=奈良県内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} [[File:790911 Uwanabe kofun aerial.jpg|thumb|280px|ウワナベ古墳の空中写真（1979年）
{{国土航空写真}}]] [[File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 5 7pbw.jpg|thumb|280px|right|{{center|[[3DCG]]で描画したウワナベ古墳}}]] [[Image:Sakitatanamikofungun.jpg|280px|right|thumb|[[平城宮]]跡（左下）と[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]
古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳
{{国土航空写真}}]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（うわなべ こふん、宇和奈邊古墳、宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[前方後円墳]]。'''[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]'''（ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する[[古墳]]の一つで、古墳群の最東端に位置し、もっとも大きい巨大古墳。 5世紀中頃に作られたとされており、[[応神天皇]]の娘、[[仁徳天皇]]の皇后である[[八田皇女]]の[[陵墓参考地]]として[[宮内庁治定陵墓の一覧#陵墓参考地|治定]]されている。 ==構造と規模== [[墳丘]]は三段で、斜面に[[葺石]]が敷かれ、一段目の周囲は[[埴輪]]が並べられていた。墳丘は宮内庁が、周囲を取り巻く周濠は地元の農家組合が管理しており、現在は上部を[[植生]]が覆っている。 [[測量]]図から全長255[[メートル]]と推測されてきたが、宮内庁や[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]、奈良市[[教育委員会]]による発掘調査結果が2020年11月20日発表され、後円部側周濠の北東と東の葺石の先で見つかった基底石を含めた全長は270-280メートルで、同じ佐紀古墳群の[[五社神古墳]]（全長267メートル）を上回り、[[日本]]国内で第12位になることが明らかとなった。 *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 270-280メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。東方向から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。前方部正面から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。後円部方向から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。西方向から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 10 7p.jpg|3DCGで描画。真横から見る ファイル:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|鰭付円筒埴輪
{{small|[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]附属博物館展示。}} == 地勢 == 6世紀に[[奈良盆地]]で栄えた[[平城京]]（奈良市、[[大和郡山市]]、[[天理市]]他）の最北端に位置する[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]は、東西約[[尺貫法#長さ・距離（度）|12町]]のあいだに、東からウワナベ古墳、[[コナベ古墳]]、水上池、[[市庭古墳]]（[[平城天皇]]楊梅陵）が並び、北側には[[ヒシアゲ古墳]]（[[仁徳天皇]]の前皇后[[磐之媛]]命の[[平城京|平城]]坂上陵）{{efn|{{コトバンク|奈良坂|平城坂（奈良坂）は奈良市の北から京都府木津川市木津に出る坂道。}}}}、ヒシャゲ古墳外堤埴輪列（復元）などが並ぶ。 上記古墳のうち[[市庭古墳]]以外は周囲に堀がめぐらされており、[[遊水地]]の島といった様態である。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} ;注釈 {{notelist}} ;出典 {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] *[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山古墳]（さき みささぎやま、奈良市山稜町）「前期末葉の巨大古墳の実態」- 奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧） == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|year=2019|chapter=平成29年度 墳丘外表面調査の成果報告 -宇和奈辺陵墓参考地-|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo070b054.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第70号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 * {{Cite book|和書|year=2022|chapter=宇和奈辺陵墓参考地整備工事予定区域事前調査|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo073b048.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第73号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 ** 「附 宇和奈辺陵墓参考地にみられた石材の石種について」。 == 外部リンク == {{osm box|w|264859508}} * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳

{{small|[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]附属博物館展示。}} == 地勢 == 6世紀に[[奈良盆地]]で栄えた[[平城京]]（奈良市、[[大和郡山市]]、[[天理市]]他）の最北端に位置する[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]は、東西約[[尺貫法#長さ・距離（度）|12町]]のあいだに、東からウワナベ古墳、[[コナベ古墳]]、[[水上池 (奈良市)|水上池]]、[[市庭古墳]]（[[平城天皇]]楊梅陵）が並び、北側には[[ヒシアゲ古墳]]（[[仁徳天皇]]の前皇后[[磐之媛]]命の[[平城京|平城]]坂上陵）{{efn|{{コトバンク|奈良坂|平城坂（奈良坂）は奈良市の北から京都府木津川市木津に出る坂道。}}}}、ヒシャゲ古墳外堤埴輪列（復元）などが並ぶ。 上記古墳のうち[[市庭古墳]]以外は周囲に堀がめぐらされており、[[遊水地]]の島といった様態である。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} ;注釈 {{notelist}} ;出典 {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] *[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山古墳]（さき みささぎやま、奈良市山稜町）「前期末葉の巨大古墳の実態」- 奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧） == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|year=2019|chapter=平成29年度 墳丘外表面調査の成果報告 -宇和奈辺陵墓参考地-|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo070b054.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第70号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 * {{Cite book|和書|year=2022|chapter=宇和奈辺陵墓参考地整備工事予定区域事前調査|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo073b048.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第73号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 ** 「附 宇和奈辺陵墓参考地にみられた石材の石種について」。 == 外部リンク == {{osm box|w|264859508}} * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

古墳群の東端、[[国道24号]]線の西に面しているものがウワナベ古墳
{{国土航空写真}}]] '''ウワナベ古墳'''（うわなべ こふん、宇和奈邊古墳、宇和奈辺古墳）は、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]法華寺町にある[[前方後円墳]]。'''[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]'''（ウワナベ古墳群）を構成する[[古墳]]の一つで、古墳群の最東端に位置し、もっとも大きい巨大古墳。 5世紀中頃に作られたとされており、[[応神天皇]]の娘、[[仁徳天皇]]の皇后である[[八田皇女]]の[[陵墓参考地]]として[[宮内庁治定陵墓の一覧#陵墓参考地|治定]]されている。 ==構造と規模== [[墳丘]]は三段で、斜面に[[葺石]]が敷かれ、一段目の周囲は[[埴輪]]が並べられていた。墳丘は宮内庁が、周囲を取り巻く周濠は地元の農家組合が管理しており、現在は上部を[[植生]]が覆っている。 [[測量]]図から全長255[[メートル]]と推測されてきたが、宮内庁や[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]、奈良市[[教育委員会]]による発掘調査結果が2020年11月20日発表され、後円部側周濠の北東と東の葺石の先で見つかった基底石を含めた全長は270-280メートルで、同じ佐紀古墳群の[[五社神古墳]]（全長267メートル）を上回り、[[日本]]国内で第12位になることが明らかとなった。 *前方部幅 129.5メートル *後円部径 128メートル *全長 270-280メートル *前方部高 16メートル *後円部高 19.8メートル File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。東方向から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。前方部正面から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。後円部方向から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3DCGで描画。西方向から見る File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 10 7p.jpg|3DCGで描画。真横から見る ファイル:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|鰭付円筒埴輪
{{small|[[奈良県立橿原考古学研究所]]附属博物館展示。}} == 地勢 == 6世紀に[[奈良盆地]]で栄えた[[平城京]]（奈良市、[[大和郡山市]]、[[天理市]]他）の最北端に位置する[[佐紀盾列古墳群]]は、東西約12[[町 (単位)|町]]のあいだに、東からウワナベ古墳、[[コナベ古墳]]、[[水上池 (奈良市)|水上池]]、[[市庭古墳]]（[[平城天皇]]楊梅陵）が並び、北側には[[ヒシアゲ古墳]]（[[仁徳天皇]]の前皇后[[磐之媛]]命の[[平城京|平城]]坂上陵）{{efn|{{コトバンク|奈良坂|平城坂（奈良坂）は奈良市の北から京都府木津川市木津に出る坂道。}}}}、ヒシャゲ古墳外堤埴輪列（復元）などが並ぶ。 上記古墳のうち[[市庭古墳]]以外は周囲に堀がめぐらされており、[[遊水地]]の島といった様態である。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} ;注釈 {{notelist}} ;出典 {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} *『奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報 奈良市法華寺町ウナワベ古墳群 大和第三、第四、第五、第六号古墳調査』奈良県 [[1949年]] *[http://www.kashikoken.jp/museum/yamatonoiseki/kofun/sakimisasagiyama.html 佐紀陵山古墳]（さき みささぎやま、奈良市山稜町）「前期末葉の巨大古墳の実態」- 奈良県立橿原考古学研究所（2020年12月13日閲覧） == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|year=2019|chapter=平成29年度 墳丘外表面調査の成果報告 -宇和奈辺陵墓参考地-|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo070b054.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第70号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 * {{Cite book|和書|year=2022|chapter=宇和奈辺陵墓参考地整備工事予定区域事前調査|title={{PDFlink|[https://shoryobu.kunaicho.go.jp/Publication/PDF/000/kiyo073b048.pdf 書陵部紀要 陵墓篇 第73号]}}|publisher=[[宮内庁書陵部]]|ref=}} - リンクは宮内庁「書陵部所蔵資料目録・画像公開システム」。 ** 「附 宇和奈辺陵墓参考地にみられた石材の石種について」。 == 外部リンク == {{osm box|w|264859508}} * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} {{デフォルトソート:うわなへこふん}} [[Category:佐紀盾列古墳群]] [[Category:奈良県の古墳]] [[Category:奈良市の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:陵墓参考地]] [[Category:佐保佐紀路]]

revision.text:
{{Japanese kofun | Name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative Name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | Location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | Image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=Location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

revision.text:
{{Japanese kofun | Name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative Name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | Location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | Image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=Location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[category:new pages]][[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:pages to try to fix ills]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:kkk]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:kkk]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:pages to try to fix ills]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

{{Infobox ancient site | Name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative Name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:kkk]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:kkk]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:pages to try to fix ills]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox ancient site | Name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative Name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:original pages]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:original pages]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

{{Infobox ancient site | name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

{{Infobox ancient site | name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:defautsort]] [[Category:fix the O]]{{DEFAULTSORTUwanabe Kofun}}[[category:fix the O]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:defautsort]] [[Category:fix the O]]{{DEFAULTSORTUwanabe Kofun}}[[category:fix the O]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

{{Infobox ancient site | name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:defautsort]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT::Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:defautsort]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Uwanabe Kofun}}[[category:unsorted completion categories]] {{DEFAULTSORT::Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

{{Infobox ancient site | name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox ancient site | name = Uwanabe Kofun | Alternative name = 宇和奈辺古墳 | Group = {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} | location = {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}, Japan | Latitude Degrees = 34 | Latitude Minutes = 41 | Latitude Seconds = 51.45 | Longitude Degrees = 135 | Longitude Minutes = 48 | Longitude Seconds = 32.47 | ISO = JP-29 | Type = {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} | Size = Length 270-280 meters{{cite web|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20201120/k00/00m/040/291000c|title="Uwanabe" reaches 280 meters in length; the largest in Saki Kofun Cluster|work=Mainichi Shimbun|date=2020-11-21|access-date=2023-12-12}}, Height 19.8 meters | Period = Mid-{{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} | Burials = {{ill|Princess Hata|ja|八田皇女}} (proposed by {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}) | Burial Management = Imperial Household Agency "Uwanabe Burial Reference Site" | Artifacts = {{ill|Cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪}} | image = [[File:Uwanabe Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:kk]]{{Kofun navbar}}[[Category:kk]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

The full view of the tumulus (front section on the left, rear circular section in the right background) | Notes = Ranked 12th or 13th in Japan depending on length (270–280 meters or 255 meters)[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html Kofun size rankings (National)] from the Sakai City website, last updated 2019-11-14, accessed 2020-12-13. | Map2 = {{location map|Japan Nara|lat_deg=34|lat_min=41|lat_sec=51.45|lon_deg=135|lon_min=48|lon_sec=32.47|label=Uwanabe Kofun|mark=Zenpō-kōen-fun.svg|marksize=23|caption=location within Nara Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|41|51.45|N|135|48|32.47|E}}}} }} == Overview == The '''Uwanabe Kofun''' (宇和奈邊古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|ja|前方後円墳}} (keyhole-shaped tumulus) located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. It is part of the {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} and is the easternmost and largest tumulus in the group. Built in the mid-5th century, it is managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the burial site of {{ill|Princess Yata |ja|八田皇女}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|応神天皇}} and consort of {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|ja|仁徳天皇}}. == Structure and Size == The tumulus is a three-tiered structure covered with {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石}}. The first tier was surrounded by a row of {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪}}. While the mound is under the jurisdiction of the Imperial Household Agency, the surrounding moat is maintained by local farmers. Vegetation now covers the surface of the tumulus. Earlier surveys estimated its length at 255 meters, but a 2020 excavation by the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所}}, Nara City Board of Education, and the Imperial Household Agency found the tumulus to be 270-280 meters long, surpassing the {{ill|Gosha-jinja Kofun|ja|五社神古墳}} (267 meters) within the same cluster. This makes it the 12th-largest tumulus in Japan. Key dimensions: * Front section width: 129.5 meters * Rear circular section diameter: 128 meters * Height: 19.8 meters (rear), 16 meters (front) File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 2 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the east File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 3 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view of the front section File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 4 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the rear File:CG Uwanabe Kofun 1 7pbw.jpg|3D rendering, view from the west File:ウワナベ古墳出土 鰭付円筒埴輪.JPG|{{ill|Flanged cylindrical haniwa|ja|鰭付円筒埴輪}}, displayed at the {{ill|Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Museum|ja|奈良県立橿原考古学研究所附属博物館}} == Geography == The {{ill|Saki Kofun Cluster|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群}} spans the northernmost edge of the {{ill|Nara Basin|ja|奈良盆地}}. It includes the {{ill|Konabe Kofun|ja|コナベ古墳}} and other notable burial mounds such as {{ill|Ichiniba Kofun|ja|市庭古墳}}. These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:kk]]{{Kofun navbar}}[[Category:kk]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]

These mounds are surrounded by moats, giving them the appearance of islands within a wetland environment. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=奈良県史跡名勝天然記念物調査抄報|publisher=奈良県|year=1949}} * {{Cite book|和書|doi=10.24484/sitereports.130938|title=奈良市埋蔵文化財調査年報|publisher=Nara City Board of Education|year=2023|chapter=ウワナベ古墳の調査 UN第2次}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Saki Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Keyhole-shaped tumuli]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Imperial Household Agency]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}} [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] {{citation needed|Uwanabe Kofun}}[[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:dd]][[Category:kk]][[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:kk]] {{Kofun navbar}}[[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Uwanabe Kofun]][[Category:kk]] [[ja:ウワナベ古墳]]
